body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Formless absorption — meditative absorption, samadhi, jhana, trance states, transcendental meditation, non-ordinary states of consciousness.

**Case study of ecstatic meditation: fMRI and EEG evidence of self-stimulating areward system.** — Neural Plast. PMID: 23738149. DOI: 10.1155/2013/653572. We report the first neural recording during ecstatic meditations called jhanas and test whether abrain reward system plays arole in the joy reported. Jhanas are Altered States of Consciousness (ASC) that imply major brain changes based on subjective reports: (1) external awareness dims, (2) internal verbalizations fade, (3) the sense of personal boundaries is altered, (4) attention is highly focused on the object of meditation, and (5) joy increases to high levels.
